## Target Branch

## Article Checklist

- [ ] Required front matter is present
- [ ] Topic is Bittensor-related
- [ ] Sources are included for technical claims
- [ ] Relevant codebase links are included where implementation behavior is described
- [ ] Article avoids speculation, price discussion, and unsupported claims
- [ ] Article avoids repeated information and unnecessary filler
- [ ] Internal links use `[[...]]`
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes

## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, build hooks, wallet seeds, or private endpoints are included
- [ ] No executable MDX, scripts, event handlers, embeds, or unsafe URLs are included
